task_objective: Resolve all 4 Code Review Action Items from GitHub Issues.

issues_resolved.title: refactor: allow CDN scripts in CSP when online
issues_resolved.summary: Dynamically constructed CSP to allow CDN origins in online mode.

issues_resolved.title: refactor: clamp correlation sampling fraction
issues_resolved.summary: Clamped correlation sampling fraction to 1.0 to prevent crashes.

issues_resolved.title: refactor: skip n_distinct for complex/unhashable types
issues_resolved.summary: Added type guard to skip n_distinct for Array/Map/Struct/JSON types.

issues_resolved.title: refactor: harden value_counts planning for high-cardinality or unknown stats
issues_resolved.summary: Hardened skip guard logic for unknown n_distinct and excluded JSON.

performance_impact: Negligible performance impact (<2%) across all changes, with some minor improvements due to better skipping.
results: All issues resolved, verified with regression tests, benchmarked, and merged into dev.
